prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年合肥工业大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约9784名、9768名、10703名、11304名、9379名。2021–2022年基本持平，2023–2024年连续两年后 移（累计后移约1520名），2025年大幅前移至9379名，较2024年前移1925名，波动较大。2025年基准位次约9379名；2021–2024年该校在天津市招生计划均为115 人，2025年增至116人；2026年计划116人，与2025年持平。计划未扩招，在考生总数大幅增加的背景下，竞争压力有所上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学 是211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第82名、2022年第83名、2023年第83名、2024年第83名、2025年第79名、2026年第80名，排名稳定在80名左右，属于中上 水平211高校；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌，部分专业无人报考）；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（涉及学术不端事件通报） 。抖音热度排名第77位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平。投档异常方面，2025年合肥工业大学被标注为低关注（热门专业投档线暴跌），可能对报考心理产生 一定滞后影响；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A（唯一A级学科），是该校最具竞争力的学科。招生专业中信息管理与信息系统（智能系统及管理）对 应管理科学与工程学科，具备学科优势。其他工科专业如机械、电气、计算机等虽未获A级评估，但作为传统工科强校，整体工科实力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业 热度方面，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与合肥工业大学工科特色高度契合，相关专业报考热度较高。天津市2026年高考考生总数 约82000人（较2025年71938人增加约14%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。天津市省控线（本科批）2021年463分、2022年463分、2023年472分、2024年475分、2025年476分，呈 逐年小幅上升趋势；2026年；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，在天津市属于外省招生。该校在天津的招生计划约115–116人，占 比较小。天津考生对长三角地区高校认可度较高，合肥作为长三角城市群成员，地域吸引力较好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移后的高位基准（9379名）、2026年招 生计划与2025年持平、天津市考生总数大幅增加约14%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般等因素，预计2026年录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约9429名， 区间8929–9929名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间8929–9929名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌工科专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如低于8929名）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、 电气工程及其自动化等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（如接近9929名）建议以二档专业为主，三档专业稳妥保底。该校管理科学与工程为A级学科，对应信息管理与信息系统 专业值得关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hefei University of Technology in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 9784, 9768, 10703, 11304, and 9379 respectively. 2021–2022 were basically flat, 2023–2024 saw a consecutive two-year decline (cumulative decline of about 1520 places), and 2025 saw a significant advance to 9379, a forward shift of 1925 places from 2024, indicating large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 9379; from 2021 to 2024, the enrollment plan in Tianjin was 115 students each year, increasing to 116 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 116 students, unchanged from 2025. The plan has not expanded, and against the backdrop of a significant increase in the total number of examinees, competitive pressure has risen.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 82nd in 2021, 83rd in 2022, 83rd in 2023, 83rd in 2024, 79th in 2025, and 80th in 2026, with a stable ranking around 80th, placing it among upper-middle-level 211 universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2025 Gaokao cycle was somewhat negative (hot majors saw a sharp drop in admission scores, some majors had no applicants); the reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle was somewhat negative (involving reports of academic misconduct incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with an average evaluation, and short video platform exposure is at a lower-middle level. Regarding admission anomalies, in 2025 Hefei University of Technology was marked as low attention (hot majors saw a sharp drop in admission scores), which may have a lagging psychological impact on applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A (the only A-level discipline), making it the university's most competitive discipline. Among the enrollment majors, Information Management and Information Systems (Intelligent Systems and Management) corresponds to the Management Science and Engineering discipline, offering a disciplinary advantage. Other engineering majors such as Mechanical, Electrical, and Computer, although not rated A, as a traditional strong engineering university, overall engineering strength is relatively high.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In terms of major popularity for 2026, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Hefei University of Technology's engineering characteristics, and related majors have high application enthusiasm. The total number of Gaokao examinees in Tianjin for 2026 is approximately 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025), with a significant expansion in examinee scale, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) in Tianjin was 463 in 2021, 463 in 2022, 472 in 2023, 475 in 2024, and 476 in 2025, showing a gradual upward trend year by year; for 2026; Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, and recruits from outside the province in Tianjin. Its enrollment plan in Tianjin is approximately 115–116 students, accounting for a relatively small proportion. Tianjin examinees have a high recognition of universities in the Yangtze River Delta region, and Hefei, as a member of the Yangtze River Delta city cluster, has good regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high baseline after the significant forward shift in 2025 ranking (9379), the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the significant increase of about 14% in the total number of Tianjin examinees leading to intensified competition, the somewhat negative school reputation, and average Douyin popularity, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9429, with a range of 8929–9929.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8929–9929, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 8929), focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., near 9929), it is recommended to primarily choose Tier 2 majors and safely secure Tier 3 majors. The university's Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, and the corresponding Information Management and Information Systems major is worth attention.
